case_title: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF SAN FRANICSCO VS JOYNER ROSETTA

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JOYNER ROSETTA
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOYNER ROSETTA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF SAN FRANICSCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOYNER ROSETTA $1,587.00 PRINCIPAL, $42.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,629.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,587.00 FILED BY HOUSING AUTHORITY OF SAN FRANICSCO AS TO DEFENDANT JOYNER ROSETTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,878.55 AS TO DEFENDANT JOYNER ROSETTA
